---
title: "Cox PH Models for Survival Analysis"
description: "A summary slide on Survival Analysis and the use of Cox regression"
# date: "2025-03-01"
toc: false
categories:
  - Statistics
---


- These are slides for a meeting in a research on duration analysis in the US marriage market. All research specific details and confidential information are omitted.

---


- [Slides: Cox PH models for Survival Analysis](https://wooyongp.github.io/Duration-and-Hazards/docs/Survival%20Analysis.html#/title-slide)
